category_sources: Official GitHub README describes object-management tasks for cloud storage services and local filesystems.
source_facts.description says it is a parallel S3 and local filesystem execution tool.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, usage, credentials, and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/peak/s5cmd; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README lists S3, GCS/S3-compatible storage, batch command, and local filesystem features.
source_facts.description identifies S3 and local filesystem execution.
